name: pragmatic-growth
description: Skills-only Claude Code plugins from Pragmatic Growth: flywheel for autonomous goal queues, html-artifacts for rich browser deliverables, autoresearch for autonomous optimization loops, and human-writing for AI-writing cleanup.

plugins.name: flywheel
plugins.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code — define-goal, dispatch, loop-architect, and factory-doctor: turn wants into measurable goal contracts, work one ready goal per run on the current branch, design autonomous loop contracts, and preflight the environment.

plugins.name: html-artifacts
plugins.description: Create self-contained HTML plans, specs, reports, research syntheses, diagrams, timelines, dashboards, decks, prototypes, and one-off editors when markdown would flatten the work.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous optimization loop — try an idea, measure it, keep what works, revert what doesn't, repeat. MAD-based confidence scoring, git branch isolation, and file-based experiment logs any fresh session can resume.

plugins.name: human-writing
plugins.description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing and add real human voice — strip inflated significance, promotional language, -ing filler, em-dash and rule-of-three overuse, AI vocabulary, and chatbot artifacts. Based on Wikipedia's 'Signs of AI writing'.
